title: Badlands Cut
notes: Connects A5 Outer Drain Cut to B4 Black Road Cut.
Badlands-facing Black Road route with scout post, culvert gate, Sable water cache, smuggler ramp, and patrol spillover.
Designed for Astro Van and small service traffic; heavy Red Concord vehicles are slowed by sand and pipe clutter.
Ground items render below Donny/NPC bodies.
